raw_consumer_statement:
Rental car reserved and paid for by Citi card and XXXX card. There is no dispute to the original rental charge. 

Rental car company made unauthorized 2nd charge of {$300.00} on XX/XX/year>. Rental company did not provide invoice, receipt, or communication for unauthorized second charge of {$300.00}. Contact attempted with rental company and no response was provided. Charge was then disputed with Citi. 

Citi rejected the dispute incorrectly stating the services were rendered. Additional documentation provided to Citi proving that the original services were paid for. Dispute is not for the services rendered, but rather the 2nd unauthorized charge without any invoice or communication by rental company.

This was explained to the Citi dispute department 4+ times in addition to appeals process. Citi continues to reject dispute without reason.
